# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: microservice-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: linkerd-gateway
    namespace: linkerd
  hostnames:
  - "microservice-*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  rules:
  - backendRefs:
    - name: frontend-service
      port: 8080
    - name: backend-service
      port: 8080
    - name: auth-service
      port: 8080
    matches:
    - path:
        type: PathPrefix
        value: /
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  port: 8080
  protocol: HTTP
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  port: 8080
  protocol: HTTP
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  port: 8080
  protocol: HTTP
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: default
  rule:
    authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: frontend-sa
        namespace: default
    ports:
    - 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-auth-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-server
    namespace: default
  rule:
    authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: frontend-sa
        namespace: default
    ports:
    - 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-auth-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-server
    namespace: default
  rule:
    authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: backend-sa
        namespace: default
    ports:
    - 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-frontend-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
    namespace: default
  rule:
    authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: backend-sa
        namespace: default
    ports:
    - 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: auth-to-backend-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: default
  rule:
    authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: auth-sa
        namespace: default
    ports:
    - 8080
